title: Fixes in Imagenet training script
body:
* ngpus_per_node variable count fix
* dist_backend assertion added for nccl issue

step_plan.summary: This PR fixes two issues in the ImageNet training script: (1) robust calculation of ngpus_per_node to avoid zero or inconsistent values across CUDA and CPU-only environments, and (2) an assertion enforcing NCCL as the distributed backend for multi-GPU training to catch misconfigurations.

steps.operation: Refactor ngpus_per_node calculation and add NCCL backend assertion in main()
steps.reason: Implement fixes described in the PR: ensure a sane non-zero ngpus_per_node value for all environments (CUDA available or not) and enforce NCCL as the backend for multi-GPU distributed training to address NCCL-related issues.
steps.side_effects: World-size and process-spawn logic will use the updated ngpus_per_node; may cause assertion failures if a non-NCCL backend is required by some configurations; tests/CI should run with NCCL-enabled environments; single-GPU or non-distributed runs should remain unaffected.
